summary: First iteration backend + frontend smoke test for Vini App (Italian wine tasting journal). Backend: 16/16 pytest tests pass covering auth (register/login/me/logout/emergent-session), wine-types (defaults+custom+duplicate rejection), wines full CRUD with filters (wine_type, location case-insensitive), 401 unauth enforcement, user isolation, and 404 for unknown wines. Frontend: login screen loads with Italian copy; admin login (admin@viniapp.com/admin123) navigates to /home which shows 'I Miei Vini' with add FAB and Per Tipologia/Per Luogo segment; Aggiungi flow fills name+location+stars and Salva creates a wine that appears as a card on home.

issues: React Native Web warnings: deprecated shadow* props (use boxShadow) and props.pointerEvents (use style.pointerEvents). Cosmetic only.

react_native_issues.issue: Expo doctor reports version drift for @react-native-async-storage/async-storage (3.0.2 vs 2.2.0), expo-image-picker (55.0.19 vs ~17.0.10), expo-location (55.1.8 vs ~19.0.8), react-native-maps (1.27.2 vs 1.20.1). App works on web but native builds may break.

action_items: (Optional) Align expo package versions via `npx expo install --fix` to match SDK expected versions before native (iOS/Android) build.
(Optional) Replace deprecated shadow* style props with boxShadow and props.pointerEvents with style.pointerEvents in src/theme and affected components.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py excludes MongoDB _id in all read queries — good.

CORS uses allow_origins=['*'] together with allow_credentials=True; browsers ignore credentials with wildcard origins. Login still works because frontend stores JWT as Bearer token in AsyncStorage, but httpOnly cookie auth for web (Google session_token) would not be usable cross-origin. Consider restricting to explicit origin(s) or documenting that web relies on Bearer for same-origin only.
Seed admin updates password if changed — idempotent and matches playbook.
bcrypt hashes generated at runtime (format $2b$) — good.
No brute-force lockout after repeated bad logins — playbook expects lockout after 5 fails; not implemented.

success_rate.frontend: 100% of smoke flows (login, home, add, list)

seed_data_creation: Tests create TEST_-prefixed users, wine-types and wines; wines are cleaned up; TEST_ users remain (harmless).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Run `pytest /app/backend/tests/test_viniapp.py -v` to regress backend. Frontend public URL: https://tasting-map.preview.emergentagent.com. Admin: admin@viniapp.com/admin123. Map tab (web) and wine detail screen, profile/logout, custom wine-type modal from UI, and GPS button were not UI-tested this iteration but underlying APIs (POST /wine-types, wines CRUD) are verified.
